allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PORT 8000 in use by PID $\($_.OwningProcess\): $\($p.ProcessName\)" } } else { "PORT 8000 is FREE" })
